title: Rebuild Audio Commentary
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild Audio Commentary?             Quote Post by The Goose » Mon Aug 04, 2008 11:12 am Is there any chance of someone involved with Evageeks doing an audio commentary? Kinda like EvaMonkey doing the first six episodes of the original series.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Aug 04, 2008 11:34 am I imagine I could do one. The Bastard King Audio Commentary: OPTIMUS PRIME EDTION wrote: Let's see... something's happening... something's happening... umm, Shinji just picked up this phone... hell, I'm not even a big fan of this Evanjellyoon stuff, so let's just say that the graphics look more crisp. I will now fill the rest of you audio commentary with Frank Sinatra music, since they decided to bastardize his work once more in the making of this movie.
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Aug 04, 2008 11:34 am I imagine I could do one. The Bastard King Audio Commentary: OP

chunks.content:
Article: Rebuild Audio Commentary
[]: Rebuild Audio Commentary?             Quote Post by The Goose » Mon Aug 04, 2008 11:12 am Is there any chance of someone involved with Evageeks doing an audio commentary? Kinda like EvaMonkey doing the first six episodes of the original series.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Aug 04, 2008 11:34 am I imagine I could do one. The Bastard King Audio Commentary: OPTIMUS PRIME EDTION wrote: Let's see... something's happening... something's happening... umm, Shinji just picked up this phone... hell, I'm not even a big fan of this Evanjellyoon stuff, so let's just say that the graphics look more crisp. I will now fill the rest of you audio commentary with Frank Sinatra music, since they decided to bastardize his work once more in the making of this movie.
